blocking_issues: manifest_binding was only a report field, did not affect valid judgment
Only checked for PACK_MANIFEST string match without verifying file existence or hash binding
fixes_applied: Made pack_manifest_included enforcement add error when PACK_MANIFEST.md not in evidence_files
Added pack_manifest_file_exists and pack_manifest_hash_bound checks with repo_root support
Updated all tests creating valid records to include PACK_MANIFEST.md

limitations: manifest_binding uses string matching for PACK_MANIFEST, not strict filename path matching
repo_root not wired for validate_record file existence/hash-bound verification
pack_manifest_file_exists and pack_manifest_hash_bound are report-only fields, not fail conditions
hash binding does not check evidence_hashes for missing entries
pack run_id / file timestamp inconsistency with prompt run_id
